description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the composer Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test:app job that runs a pre‑instruction echo, then installs PHP build dependencies with `apk add --no-cache $PHPIZE_DEPS`, installs Xdebug via `pecl install xdebug-2.6.0` and enables it with `docker-php-ext-enable xdebug`, runs `composer install`, executes `./vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite=unit --coverage-text --colors=never --log-junit reports/phpunit-junit.log --testdox-html reports/phpunit-report.html`, runs `./vendor/bin/phpcs -sw --standard=phpcs_squiz.xml.dist src --basepath=. --report=full --report-file=reports/phpcs-report.log || echo "phpcs failed"`, and runs `./vendor/bin/phpmd src html phpmd.xml.dist --reportfile reports/phpmd-report.html --ignore-violations-on-exit`, and archives the `reports` directory as an artifact that expires after 30 minutes. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test:app, creates a `public` folder, copies `ci/pages/index.html` and all files from `reports/` into it, and publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The pages job is limited to the `master` branch.
